sourceAmbiguity: Reachability repair could be confused with demographic source correction.
decisionTaken: Repair is scoped to Vecells reachability for active callback, reply, and reminder paths.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Reachability governs whether Vecells can safely continue communication, not whether external demographic truth changes.
operationalRisk: Support workflows may request broader demographic repair from the same entry.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Route external demographic correction requests to the owning authority instead of expanding this card.
